segments.text: It's that 'try waiting if you can' vibe, right?
segments.original_text: 待ってみろよって感じですよね

segments.text: MASA doesn't need to commit to anything deep from here
segments.original_text: MASAはここから深く強気な択を取る必要はありません

segments.text: But that's exactly why they might go aggressive—applying that pressure
segments.original_text: でもだからこそ強気に来るかもしれないというそんな圧もかけています

segments.text: Grabs it out, extends from fair, keeps the damage rolling
segments.original_text: つかみ出して空中前からさらに火力を伸ばして
なんとか暴れダイヤのツルハシから

segments.text: Wants the KO conversion here but...
segments.original_text: これは撃墜に持っていきたいがなんだって

full_text: Alright, facing left It's that 'try waiting if you can' vibe, right? Yeah If they could wait MASA doesn't need to commit to anything deep from here But that's exactly why they might go aggressive—applying that pressure Grabs it out, extends from fair, keeps the damage rolling Come on, Larrixs Somehow escaping from Daiya's pickaxe Wants the KO conversion here but... Back air!

corrections.corrected: 撃墜に持っていきたい
corrections.rule: kanji homophone: 激推→撃墜, 移動→に持ってい
